title: StackOne
body:
This mod changes the maximum stacking limit of items to 1 / group. You will not be able to stack any items.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/63326494/163698038-fb59d9f3-efa4-490a-a458-c17b7b80d637.png)

### Bugs


Not compatible with EnderIO.


### Warnings
The fabric-all-1.0.2 version only support 1.14-1.19.2 version.

The fabric-all-1.0.3 version only support 1.20-1.20.4 version.

Because of "Item Stack Component", this mod doesn't update to 1.20.5+ version.
